creator: steve@energistic.com
text:
This patch updates devel/pwlib from 1.10.3 to 1.12.0. Some of
	the installed header layout has changed which will break compilation
	of some other ports. Patches for net/openh323 and net/gatekeeper
	follow. The maintainer of opal has a seperate patchset they will be
	submitting.

Fix: Apply the following patch. Also available at:
	http://steve.energistic.com/h323-ports/pwlib-1.10.3-1.12.0.patch

	Patch applies from ports/
